name: Pickled Bread-And-Butter Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
Yield: About 8 to 9 pints
Procedure:
1. Cover zucchini and onion slices with 1 inch of water and salt. Let stand for 2 hours, then drain thoroughly.
2. Combine vinegar, sugar, mustard seed, celery seed, and turmeric in a saucepan. Bring to a boil and return the vegetables to the pan.
3. Simmer for 5 minutes, then fill jars with the mixture, leaving 1/2-inch headspace.
4. Adjust lids and process according to Table 1 or use low-temperature pasteurization treatment.
Table 1: Recommended processing time for Pickled Bread-and-Butter Zucchini in a boiling-water canner.
Style of Pack: Hot
Jar Size: Pints or Quarts
Process Time at Altitudes of 0 - 1,000 ft: 10 minutes
Process Time at Altitudes of 1,001 - 6,000 ft: 15 minutes
Process Time at Altitudes Above 6,000 ft: 20 minutes
